name: mymir
description: Persistent context network for coding projects. Tracks tasks, dependencies, and decisions across sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Persistent task graph and context for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use Mymir to keep Codex oriented across project sessions. It tracks projects, tasks, dependency edges, implementation decisions, execution records, and stage-specific context so agents can find what is ready, what is blocked, and what to do next.
defaultPrompt: Use $mymir to show what's ready, blocked, and next.
Use $mymir to plan the next task.
Use $mymir to record what changed after this task.
